sections.title: If the player does not have the requirements to start The Forsaken Tower

lines.speaker: Councillor Unkar
lines.text: ...and he says that it's of the greatest urgency.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Greatest urgency? I don't like urgency. This is quite simply not on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hiya!

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Who is this human, Councillor Unkar? What are they doing here?

lines.speaker: Councillor Unkar
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't know.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Oh. Could you make them go away?

lines.speaker: Councillor Unkar
lines.text: Sorry human. We're currently engaging in important official business. You'll need to come back another time.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Oh look, it's the human. Hello human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Myself? Oh.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Well I'm Vulcana Lovakengj, the head of Lovakengj House. I rule the city of Lovakengj.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cool.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Oh... No I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh, fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about Lovakengj.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Lovakengj?

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Yes! I know a lot about Lovakengj!

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Lovakengj is a city of dwarves. It's the only non-human city in Kourend.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Lovakengj is very important you know. The resources mined here are used throughout the kingdom. Weapons, armour, tools, buildings...

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: All sorts of things come out of Lovakengj.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your plans.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: My plans? Hmm let me see now...

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Ah, I know. I'll have a sherry.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Jorra! Bring me a sherry.

lines.speaker: Jorra
lines.text: Yes Lady Lovakengj.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Goodbye human.

sections.title: If the player lost the memoir page before using it on the memoir

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Oh look, it's the human. Hello human.

lines.speaker: Lady Vulcana Lovakengj
lines.text: Apparently you need a reward or something? Here you go.
